reviews.author: Harman S.
reviews.title: Useless product warranty and waste of money
reviews.body: Worst product ever boight on Amazon... I do not have the option to give minus so have to give 1 star.. service center responds on time, hiwever they will only visit and dont resolve the issues you are facing with the product. None of the filter tubes of Kent are covered under warranty, so they are giving the warranty of only motor which costs around 2000... no carbon filter so it wont ever remove the smell of the water... sorry to say but the company is spending on promotions.. not R&D or the product quality, as I never gaced this issue with my previous RO which was of a local company...

reviews.author: Thirunishath
reviews.title: Very disappointed.. ITS 1 YEAR LIFETIME NOT 1 YEAR WARRANTY
reviews.body: ⭐ 1 Star Very disappointed with this purifier and the after-sales service from . The machine started raising filter alarms almost exactly after 1 year — just 2 weeks after the warranty ended. The technician then said the complete filter has to be replaced, costing around ₹5,000. When we contacted customer care, they said this is the “usual process” and that customers are expected to spend around ₹5,000 every year for new filters. They also mentioned that if the filter fails within the warranty period, it would be replaced free of cost, but once the warranty ends — even by a few days — the cust

reviews.author: Anant Mitra
reviews.title: Defective Product, Poor Service, and No Resolution Under Warranty
reviews.body: I purchased this water filter on 30th October 2025, and my experience has been extremely disappointing. From the very first month, the unit started giving frequent alarm alerts due to a faulty internal component. What’s worse is that the service engineer who visited clearly seemed aware of the issue, yet instead of replacing the defective part, they simply reset the alarm each time. This temporary fix has now been repeated more than 10 times within a short period, which is completely unacceptable for a product that is still under warranty. Despite multiple complaints, the company has refused t

reviews.author: Raju
reviews.title: Worst Purfier. Not long lasting. Substandard for the Huge price they charged
reviews.body: I would rate this Zero if I have to. This product lasted exactly 1 year and started beeping as soon as 1 Year warranty period was over on February 2026. It started troubling in March 2026. Called a technician to check and he said you have to change filter inside and that would cost 5,600 + taxes ofcourse. The water is decent and the previous water Purifier I had from Blue Star lasted for like 3 years with proper changing of outer filter every 3 to 4 months. I wouldn't recommend buying this at all.

reviews.author: PAMIT
reviews.title: Please don't buy kent product, one of the worst product, and worst service centre support
reviews.body: One of the worst product i have purchased, jab se liya hoon pareshan hi hoon , 10 days thik se nahi chalta then beep sound kar band ho jata hai phir on hi nahi hota bas beep ki sound nikalta rahta hai, service centre wale bhi one off the worst hai , 6-7 days tak koi banane nahi ata hai , chahe jitni bhi request kar lo, app logo se request hai ki please kent ka product mat lena inse handle hota hi nahi , ek to service centre wale jabardasti pre filter lagwaya jabki mera TDS 290 KE APPROX , aur 3 month main hi jabardasti aa kar prefilter ka cartilage change karne laga, so mainai apne genuine rev
